Size Guide

All measurements in centimetres (cm)

SizeChestLengthShoulderSleeve
XS82–86643820
S87–92674021
M93–98704222
L99–106734523
XL107–114764824

Relaxed unisex fit. Prefer fitted → size down. Oversized look → size up one.

📏
Chest
Around the fullest part of your chest, tape horizontal under your arms.
📐
Length
Top of shoulder straight down to the hem of the garment.
↔
Shoulder
Across the back from one shoulder seam edge to the other.
💪
Sleeve
From shoulder seam along outer arm to the end of the cuff.

Use a flexible tape. Have a friend help for accuracy. Always measure twice.

Our Philosophy

The Traditions
That Shape Us

We believe styling is more than just for the looks — it's a ritual. SIMTYS MERCH was built for those who respect the traditions while rewriting the rules. Premium streetwear for modern styling.

Description
+
Material & Production
+
100% ring-spun combed cotton, 180gsm. Water-based inks — will not crack or fade. Relaxed unisex fit. Small batch production. Machine wash cold inside out. Do not bleach. Tumble dry low. Iron on reverse only.
Shipping & Returns
+
Ships within 1–3 business days. Singapore delivery 3–5 days · SGD 4.50. Free shipping above SGD 60. Unused items may be returned within 14 days. Size exchanges are free. Email hello@simtys.sg with order number.
Care Instructions
+
🧺 Machine wash cold (30°C max) · ↔ Wash inside out · ✕ Do not bleach · 🔆 Tumble dry low · 🔥 Iron reverse at medium heat · ✕ Do not dry clean

Frequently Asked

Quick
Answers.

When will my order ship?+
Orders are processed within 1–3 business days. Standard shipping within Singapore takes 3–5 days. You'll receive a tracking number by email once your tee leaves our hands.
Can I exchange my size?+
Yes! Unused items in original condition can be exchanged within 14 days of delivery. Size exchanges are free — email us with your order number and the size you need.
Do you ship internationally?+
Currently we ship within Singapore and Malaysia. International shipping is coming soon. Join our newsletter to be notified first.
Are the tees true to size?+
Yes, our tees are relaxed unisex fit and run true to size. If you prefer an oversized look, we recommend sizing up by one. Check our size guide for exact measurements.
When is the next drop?+
We're already working on the next collection. Subscribe to our newsletter to get early access. No spam, ever.
Are the designs limited edition?+
Yes. Each design is limited to 50 units per colourway. Once sold out, we won't restock — that's what makes each piece special.
